legislation_refs.name: Pandemic and All-Hazards Preparedness and Response Act
legislation_refs.context: SEC. 407. ASSESSMENT OF ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE THREATS TO HEALTH SECURITY

named_docs.name: Assessment of Artificial Intelligence Threats to Health Security Study
named_docs.owner_org: National Academies of Sciences, Engineering, and Medicine
named_docs.context: conduct a study assessing the potential vulnerabilities to health security presented by the current or prospective use or misuse of artificial intelligence

named_docs.name: National Academies Report on AI Threats to Health Security
named_docs.owner_org: National Academies of Sciences, Engineering, and Medicine
named_docs.context: Not later than 2 years after the date of the contract, the National Academies shall submit a report on the study

named_docs.name: HHS Report on AI Risk Mitigation and Monitoring
named_docs.owner_org: Department of Health and Human Services
named_docs.context: the Secretary shall submit a report detailing actions taken to mitigate and monitor risks to health security posed by misuse of artificial intelligence
